No Poverty.reason: No explicit or inferred evidence in the course syllabus supports any targets related to poverty eradication.

Zero Hunger.reason: No explicit or inferred evidence in the course syllabus supports any targets related to hunger, food security, or sustainable agriculture.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: No explicit or inferred evidence in the course syllabus supports any targets related to health, well-being, or disease prevention.

Quality Education.reason: The course strongly emphasizes practical, vocational skills for employment and diverse career development, directly aligning with Target 4.4. Model B's original evidence was more comprehensive, which Model A adopted.

Gender Equality.reason: No explicit or inferred evidence in the course syllabus supports any targets related to gender equality or women's empowerment.

Clean Water and Sanitation.reason: No explicit or inferred evidence in the course syllabus supports any targets related to water, sanitation, or hygiene.

Affordable and Clean Energy.reason: No explicit or inferred evidence in the course syllabus supports any targets related to energy access, renewable energy, or energy efficiency.

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: The course directly fosters skills for employment, entrepreneurship (self-media), and e-commerce, aligning strongly with Targets 8.3 and 8.6. Model B's original reasoning was more comprehensive and adopted by Model A.

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: The course focuses on modern media infrastructure, virtual studio technology, and industry partnerships, directly supporting innovation and technological upgrading (Targets 9.5, 9.b). Model B's original reasoning was more explicit and adopted by Model A.

Reduced Inequalities.reason: The concept '人人是媒體' (everyone is media) implies a democratization of media creation, which could indirectly promote social inclusion (Target 10.2). This is an inferred, weak link.

Sustainable Cities and Communities.reason: No explicit or inferred evidence in the course syllabus supports any targets related to urban development, housing, or public spaces.

Responsible Consumption and Production.reason: No explicit or inferred evidence in the course syllabus supports targets related to sustainable consumption, waste reduction, or resource efficiency.

Climate Action.reason: No explicit or inferred evidence in the course syllabus supports any targets related to climate change mitigation, adaptation, or awareness.

Life Below Water.reason: No explicit or inferred evidence in the course syllabus supports any targets related to marine ecosystems or ocean health.

Life on Land.reason: No explicit or inferred evidence in the course syllabus supports any targets related to terrestrial ecosystems, biodiversity, or land degradation.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: The '人人是媒體' (everyone is media) concept has a minimal, inferred link to public access to information (Target 16.10), though the course focuses on technical skills.

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: The course explicitly mentions '計畫與產業合作' (plan to cooperate with industry) for e-commerce programs, directly aligning with Target 17.17 on public-private partnerships. Model B's original reasoning was explicit and adopted by Model A.
